name: change_website_theme
description: Changes the website color scheme and font. Use this when the client asks to change colors, make it look more modern, cooler, warmer, or change the style/feel of the website. The 'earthy' theme is warm with cream/terracotta colors and serif font. The 'slate' theme is cool, modern with neutral grey colors and sans-serif font.

themeVariant.description: The theme to apply. Use 'slate' for a cool, modern look with grey tones and sans-serif font. Use 'earthy' for a warm look with cream/terracotta colors and serif font.

name: change_website_photo
description: Changes the roof photo on the website. Use this when the client says the photo is wrong, doesn't look right, wants a different photo, or mentions the roof type in the image is incorrect.

roofPhotoFixed.description: Set to true to show the corrected roof photo, false to revert to original.

name: change_faq_question
description: Updates the first FAQ question on the website. Use this when the client wants to change, update, or replace the first question in the FAQ section.

faqFirstQuestion.description: The new text for the first FAQ question. Should be a clear question that a potential roofing customer would ask.

name: reset_website
description: Resets the website back to its original state. Use this if the client wants to start over or undo all changes.
